Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Jan-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Leong appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that it read the disclaimers and asked who will take once the parents are declared pre-deceased. Mrs. Leong stated that the decedent had two brothers who will take. Discussion was held regarding the issue of whether an 11700 and a petition for final distribution could be filed simultaneously. Status on close of estate is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
